ogTitle: Little Swanport vs Loccota: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Little Swanport and Loccota.
heading: Little Swanport vs Loccota — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Little Swanport, Tasmania and Loccota, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Loccota has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Little Swanport (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Little Swanport or Loccota safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Little Swanport has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Loccota scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Little Swanport scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Loccota scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Little Swanport or Loccota?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Loccota has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
